response.original_title: Is C o i n b a s e  safe right now?{{Legit Safe}
response.overview: Yes, for US retail customers, C o i n b a s e  offer 24/7 phone support ☎️1-[850].600.1393 and live messaging via their Help Center. Additionally, Customers who subscribe to  C o i n b a s e One ☎️1-[850].600.1393 have access to dedicated 24/7 phone support from a specialized team. If you need to contact them via email, ☎️1-[850].600.1393 you can find instructions and email addresses on their support page.
